Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[@Name="BasePokerSoldier" or defName="RA_Obsession" or defName="RA_Fruiter" or defName="RA_Shadow" or defName="RA_De_lovely" or defName="RA_DarkKnight" or defName="RA_DarkKnight_Commander"]

Defs/ThingDef[@Name="BasePokerSoldier" or defName="RA_Obsession" or defName="RA_Fruiter" or defName="RA_Shadow" or defName="RA_De_lovely" or defName="RA_DarkKnight" or defName="RA_DarkKnight_Commander"]/hideStats
